data.description:
## Why
This is the convergence mechanism itself: reuse plan-review's novelty machinery to stop code review re-nagging carryover findings and to drop novel low-impact findings on UNCHANGED code, while always raising novel findings on newly-changed code.

## What
- Consume the reader (`latest_code_review_result`) for the current review's typed key to obtain prior SURFACED findings + the prior `deps` map.
- REUSE unchanged: the novelty sub-call contract (review_kernel/verify.py: score current findings vs prior -> novelty per finding) and `rising_floor_drop(priority, novelty)` (review_kernel/decide.py).
- NEW `region_gated_floor` (in code_review): a finding is dropped iff `rising_floor_drop(...)` is true AND its cited file's region is provably UNCHANGED. Region detector is tri-state from the content-hash compare (current file sha vs prior `deps[path]`): UNCHANGED / CHANGED / UNKNOWN; only UNCHANGED enables the drop; UNKNOWN == raise. Absence-evidence, multi-location, moved, and renamed-file findings resolve to UNKNOWN. File-level for v1.
- Carryover (low-novelty) findings: label `carried run/patchset N` and SKIP re-coaching (do not re-emit the coach move); they are kept (raised), never suppressed.
- Wire into BOTH gate paths (local + Gerrit voter). Pass-1 finder stays prior-blind (neutrality); the novelty seam runs only after find+verify. No eval-gated flag.

## Scope
- src/rebar/llm/code_review/workflow_ops.py (decide + coach seams), a new region-gate helper, reuse of review_kernel.
- Depends on the reader/payload story.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] region_gated_floor drops a finding only when novel AND low-priority AND region==UNCHANGED; UNKNOWN and CHANGED both raise.
- [ ] Carryover findings are labeled `carried ... N` and are not re-coached, but remain surfaced.
- [ ] The Pass-1 finder receives no prior findings; only the post-find novelty seam does.
- [ ] Novel findings on changed code, and any high-priority finding, are always raised.
- [ ] Tests: unchanged-region low-priority novel -> dropped; changed-region novel -> raised; absence/multi-location finding -> UNKNOWN -> raised; carryover -> labeled + not re-coached.
data.title: region_gated_floor: content-addressed novelty convergence for code review
